form.formComment: Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start 4th of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 2 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 60kg at $17. Before that 9th of 13 at this track in the G1 Majorca Stakes on January 31 over 1600m, 6 len behind Double Grand Slam carrying 60kg at $101. Can improve on that reasonable effort last time out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10.5). Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start 4th of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 2 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 60kg at $17. Before that 9th of 13 at this track in the G1 Majorca Stakes on January 31 over 1600m, 6 len behind Double Grand Slam carrying 60kg at $101. Can improve on that reasonable effort last time out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide in the early stages.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of nine weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 13 at this track in the G1 Majorca Stakes January 31 over 1600m, 6 len behind Double Grand Slam carrying 60kg at $101. Previously first up; second of 9 at Durbanville August 27 over 1250m, a long neck behind Dumbledore with 56kg at $15. Should be right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-14). Filly back from a spell of nine weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 13 at this track in the G1 Majorca Stakes January 31 over 1600m, 6 len behind Double Grand Slam carrying 60kg at $101. Previously first up; second of 9 at Durbanville August 27 over 1250m, a long neck behind Dumbledore with 56kg at $15. Should be right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run and had to be directed outwards.
At the 1400m, awkwardly placed on the inside of Time For Love.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 5 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 56.5kg at $34. Previously second-up second last of 8 at this track on November 10 over 1600m, 6 len behind Reet Petite with 58kg at $6.50. Don't underestimate.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10.5). Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 5 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 56.5kg at $34. Previously second-up second last of 8 at this track on November 10 over 1600m, 6 len behind Reet Petite with 58kg at $6.50. Don't underestimate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 400m, carried outwards marginally by Scarlet Macaw.
Showed a tendency to hang out from the 200m, bumping Rahhabba.
At the 250m, raced green, rolled out and made slight contact with Keep Warm.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 37-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 7 at this track in LR on February 28 over 1800m, 1.3 len behind Beach Verse with 59kg at $3.30. The run before that 3rd of 9 at this track in the G3 Final Fling Stakes on January 31 over 2000m, 3 len behind Time For Love with 50kg at $2.70. In the money at the latest appearance and is among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Recent form sound. Comes here off a 37-day let-up. The run before that 3rd of 9 at this track in the G3 Final Fling Stakes on January 31 over 2000m, 3 len behind Time For Love with 50kg at $2.70. In the money at the latest appearance and is among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 1200m, shifted in and caused American Beauty to be steadied.
Had Saachi One momentarily inconvenienced when close to its heels at the 150m.
At the 150m, carried outwards by Eisteddfod.
Hanging out and raced with an awkward head carriage in the early stages.
Elusive Gift shifted out and made contact with Queen Regent leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start 3rd of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 1.4 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 60kg at $4.50. The start before that 5th of 13 at this track in the G1 Majorca Stakes on January 31 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Double Grand Slam carrying 60kg at $51. Well placed to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, bumped outwards Be Merry.
Jumped outwards.
Slow into stride.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, nose behind Princess Of Gaul carrying 56.5kg at $4.50. The run before that won by 1.0 len at this track February 4 over 1400m defeating Air Raid with 57kg at $8. Poised to win after a narrow defeat last time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10.5). Recent form sound. Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, nose behind Princess Of Gaul carrying 56.5kg at $4.50. The run before that won by 1.0 len at this track February 4 over 1400m defeating Air Raid with 57kg at $8. Poised to win after a narrow defeat last time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 150m, shifted in causing Babelicious to check.
Shortly after the start, bumped Rahhabba.

form.formComment: Comes off a 45 day let-up. Most recently 5th of 11 at Fairview in LR on February 20 over 1200m, 2 len behind Symphony In White carrying 60kg at $15. The run before that 5th of 11 at this track on January 31 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Babelicious carrying 52kg at $9. Doesn't look good enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Comes off a 45 day let-up. Most recently 5th of 11 at Fairview in LR on February 20 over 1200m, 2 len behind Symphony In White carrying 60kg at $15. The run before that 5th of 11 at this track on January 31 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Babelicious carrying 52kg at $9. Doesn't look good enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped slow, losing one length.
Shortly after the start, shifted ground marginally and squeezed Babelicious.
Leaving the 300m, switched in away from the heels of a tiring Garden of Eden.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at this track in the G3 Final Fling Stakes January 31 over 2000m, 5 len behind Time For Love with 57.5kg at $4. First up last campaign ran last in a small field at this track November 22 over 1600m, 3 len behind Double Grand Slam carrying 60kg at $17. Doesn't appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride.
